content: Authentication module: Handles user login, JWT token generation, OAuth2 flows, and session management. Uses bcrypt for password hashing.
Payment processing module: Integrates with Stripe and PayPal. Handles refunds, subscriptions, and PCI-compliant card tokenization.
User management module: CRUD operations for user profiles, preferences, and account settings. Includes role-based access control.
UI components library: React components for forms, buttons, modals, and responsive layouts. Includes accessibility features.
Dashboard module: Real-time analytics, charts, and data visualization for monitoring KPIs and user engagement metrics.
Deployment automation module: Terraform configurations, Kubernetes manifests, and CI/CD pipeline definitions for AWS and GCP.
Monitoring module: Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and alerting rules for system health and performance.
Utility functions: Common helpers for string manipulation, date formatting, validation, and error handling across all modules.
Configuration module: Centralized config management with environment variables, feature flags, and secrets management.
